title: Screening of groundnut genotypes for drought tolerance post-rainy season - 1987-88
abstract: During 1987-1988 postrainy season we screened 144 groundnut genotypes for tolerance to drought in the field.  Among these, 124 genotypes belonged to vars and fastigiata and vulgaris of sub species fastigiata (Spanish and valencis types) (Expt. A) and the rest 20. belonged to var hypogaea of subspecies hypogaea, (Virginia bunch types (Expt. B)...
